summary: Completed comprehensive testing of salon billing software with new features: monthly calendar view for appointments, logo upload functionality, and enhanced notification system. Most features working correctly with some minor issues identified.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 error when generating PDF with uploaded logo
critical_bugs.impact: PDF generation fails when salon logo is present
critical_bugs.details: OSError: broken data stream when reading image file - ReportLab cannot process the uploaded logo image format

ui_bugs.issue: Missing Mail import causing runtime errors
ui_bugs.details: ReferenceError: Mail is not defined - prevents notification buttons from working

integration_issues.issue: Email/SMS reminder buttons not functional due to missing imports

passed_tests: Appointments page loads with calendar view as default
Current month display and today highlighting
Appointment creation form with all required fields
All salon profile fields pre-filled with correct data (Ma-ke Salon, address, phone, email)
Logo upload area visible and clickable
Salon profile returns logo_path field after upload
Notification endpoint returns proper config errors for email/SMS
Backend API authentication and CRUD operations
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Fix missing Mail import in Appointments.js to enable notification buttons. 2. Fix PDF generation issue when logo is included - may need to handle image format conversion for ReportLab compatibility.
